subject: Milcery, a small cream-colored blob Pokemon in a pastel dessert-shop interior
description: A small, cream-colored Pokemon with a round body and stubby raised arms floats or sits in a warm, pastel-toned interior setting. Soft pink and peach tones fill the background, and what appears to be pastries or sweet food items are visible on shelves or surfaces nearby. The creature's form is smooth and fluid like whipped cream, and it raises its arms in a welcoming gesture. The scene has a cozy, confectionery atmosphere.
foreground: small cream-colored blob Pokemon with raised arms
background: warm pastel interior with pastry items visible
